data.current_description: servicio encargado de proveer Token de autenticación.
data.summary_suggestion: Authenticate user and obtain access token
data.description_suggestion: Authenticates a user with provided credentials and returns an authentication token for subsequent API requests. Accepts username/password or equivalent credentials as input. Returns an AuthResponse containing the access token. This token must be included in the Authorization header for authenticated requests.
data.reasoning: Current summary is a path reference, not an action. Description lacks clarity on inputs (credentials), outputs (token details), and how the token should be used. data.current_description: servicio encargado de validar Token de autenticación
data.description_suggestion: Retrieves the profile information of the currently authenticated user. Requires a valid authentication token in the Authorization header. data.current_description: servicio encargado de crear y actualizar una tarea
data.summary_suggestion: Create new task or update existing task
data.description_suggestion: Creates a new task or updates an existing task depending on whether a task ID is provided in the request. Accepts a TaskRequest object containing task details. Returns the created or updated Task object with assigned ID and timestamps. If task ID is provided, performs an update; if omitted, creates a new task. Requires authentication via bearer token.
